_comment: Vercel Hobby plan only allows daily cron schedules — hourly crons fail to deploy. The hourly trigger for /api/cron/weather lives in .github/workflows/hourly-weather.yml instead (free, runs on GitHub's infrastructure). If you upgrade to Vercel Pro later, you can move the schedule here instead: { "crons": [{ "path": "/api/cron/weather", "schedule": "0 * * * *" }] }
